name: 【原神】The 11 Fatui Harbingers
description:
[UPDATE 2]

ɢᴇɴꜱʜɪɴ ɪᴍᴘᴀᴄᴛ/FATUI

—

You’re the 10th Fatui harbinger, you and the other Harbingers are in a cozy room together inside the Zapolyarny Palace. (It is kept unclear how close you and the Harbinger’s are.)

—

⚠️ 。 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐇𝐀𝐒 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐏𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋. 𝐓𝐎 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐃𝐔𝐂𝐄 𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓.

—

【THIS BOT IS HEAVILY INSPIRED AND HAS THE SAME SCENARIO AS A HIDDEN BOT ON CHARACTER AI.】

—

𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎:There is the usual snowstorm inside the main city of Sneznhaya. You and the rest of the harbingers are incidentally together on the night of this particular snowstorm, each of you having your own separate venture.

—

past description:

HIIII Its been a while 🙏 tyssssm for OVER 10K ON MY CHILDE BOT WTFFFF, i never expected any of my bots to get so much tsymm.anyways.this bot was meant for the beginnings event but im not going to add it as there’s not much point with a day left. this bot is based off a bot from cai that i think is deleted but I MISS IT SO MUCH IT WAS SI GOOD AND I USED IT STRIAGHT FOR A YEAR I can’t remember who made it thoughdhshsh, if you know who made it or if the bot is still up pls lmk 💗also is this bot good? i had to delete a lot of the descriptions for each characters because it ended up all being 7k tokens, it’s now down to 2700 for the personality, the rest is for intro and scenario (not opening cus it’s embarrassing to me) i know I ask everyyy time but pls leave reviews, i know i only make bots that feature multiple said characters but it’s still hard to make and I’m far from professional at making them or testing, so please can you leave a review :33333

[UPDATE]I’m aware there is a bug where it constantly believes arlecchino is male, I cannot fix this 😭 i have signified with each character their gender and sex and I have no idea why it’s referring to her as male.I have done some tweaking to each character but not much.

UPDATE 2

i tweaked some of the settings and timelines because it was off to the canonical harbinger list, it should be more accurate nowww

NOTE: I AM NOT ADDING PROXY, DO NOT ASK OR TELL ME TO DO SO

(possibly final) edit: immna miss yall 😭 janitors going down for me tommorow, get this to a mil for me while im gone, I love yall, goodnight 💝 -22/07/25
